name: Spain
short_desc: The most common destination for British deaths abroad. Well-established repatriation process through local funeral directors.

name: France
short_desc: Close proximity means faster repatriation. French bureaucracy requires patience with death registration.

name: Thailand
short_desc: Complex process involving multiple government departments. Embassy support is critical.

name: United States
short_desc: State-by-state rules add complexity. Embalming typically mandatory for air transport.

name: Greece
short_desc: Island deaths add logistical challenges. Mainland repatriation is more straightforward.

name: Turkey
short_desc: Growing British tourist destination. Process involves the local prosecutor and forensic medicine.

name: Portugal
short_desc: Similar process to Spain. Large British expat community means experienced local funeral directors.

name: Italy
short_desc: Regional variation in processes. Northern Italy tends to be faster than the south.

name: India
short_desc: Multi-step process with police involvement. NOC from police required before release of body.

name: Egypt
short_desc: Forensic examination mandatory in many cases. Process runs through the prosecutor's office.

name: Australia
short_desc: Well-organised system but distance makes air freight costly. State coroner involvement for unexpected deaths.

name: Germany
short_desc: Efficient bureaucracy. Standesamt death registration is fast. EU regulations simplify cross-border transfer.

name: Cyprus
short_desc: Large British community. Local funeral directors experienced with UK repatriation.

name: UAE
short_desc: Efficient process through hospitals and police. Islamic law considerations for Muslim deceased.

name: Philippines
short_desc: Complex multi-agency process. Municipal health officer clearance required. Distance adds cost.

name: South Africa
short_desc: Department of Home Affairs death registration. Police clearance needed for unnatural deaths.

name: Kenya
short_desc: Government chief's burial permit required. Limited embalming facilities outside Nairobi.

name: Canada
short_desc: Provincial jurisdiction over death registration. Direct flights to UK make transport straightforward.

name: Morocco
short_desc: Among the lower-cost non-European repatriations. Casablanca is the main cargo hub with direct UK flights.

name: Brazil
short_desc: São Paulo and Rio are the main cargo corridors. Portuguese-language documentation requires careful handling.

name: Mexico
short_desc: Mexico City cases move faster than resort areas. Forensic investigation timing drives the overall timeline.
